hotel_name: Holiday Inn Express Hotels- Hampton By IHG

reviews.title: My mistake
reviews.text: It was my mistake to even consider staying at holiday inn. I’ve never stayed at one before but there were little black hairs on the bed sheets and towels. I will never stay here again.  Too bad because the front desk staff is lovely. Very nice.

reviews.title: Miserable very miserable
reviews.positives: The elevator was broken and we had to haul luggage up 5 flight of stairs.
reviews.negatives: The beds were uncomfortable and the staff were not helpful at all.

reviews.title: The location was good however they stay was terrible
reviews.negatives: The elevator was broken. You can hear everything in your room. People talking, slamming doors and running water. The room phone didn’t work so I had to walk down stairs for a towel and blanket. Both pancake machines were broken and the person serving the food was rude. Kept telling people to put the tops down.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: hotel was clean and staff was freindly

reviews.title: Pool was unavailable so I couldn’t take my grandkids swimming.. one of my grandkids are autistic.. had to evacuate 3 min
reviews.positives: I’m am IHG member.. I’ve never had a problem until recently

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: We were disappointed the pool was not available.

reviews.title: Amazing Customer Service
reviews.text: Front desk customer service from Austin and jerry was absolutely phenomenal throughout the stay they were available for all needs that were met, the location was absolutely perfect with everything nearby. Rooms and amenities were satisfying as well. i highly recommend and will definite be staying for my next VA beach visit!

reviews.title: Never staying at this location in Hampton Va again
reviews.negatives: My new truck and 3 other vehicles were broken into. Crackheads and panhandlers saturated the area. No cameras in the parking lot. Our windows were busted out for and in my case they didn’t get anything but a box of 9mm ammo

reviews.title: Best Hotel in Hampton!
reviews.text: I've stayed at a few different hotels in Hampton for Supernova Ska Festival and Holiday Inn Express is by far the best! Very clean, awesome breakfast, nice indoor pool, and the friendliest and most helpful staff I've ever encountered at a hotel. Great value for the price when you split it with friends, honestly. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.positives: The front desk was accommodating when we asked for our room to be changed.
reviews.negatives: Our room was dirty, there were blood stains in the wall and also what looked like a dried boogie on the wall. We were able to change rooms but the room we moved to had stains on the towels, blankets, and the bathroom wall. We only stayed one night but never again

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Wonderful staff and hotel facilities!  Highly recommended!

reviews.title: My stay was characterized by disappointing cleanliness and unpleasant odors throughout the property, with the room and c
reviews.positives: The staff were very friendly and helpful
reviews.negatives: The property was not clean and smelled musty, the hallway, elevators and rooms were not up to holiday inn express expectations. My bathtub was dirty, my pillow had stains on them hallway was dirty and smelled musty and wet

reviews.title: Loved it!
reviews.text: Very comfortable, good breakfast and the pool was warmed!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Very loud!!! Lots of road noise!!!

reviews.title: Great Stay, very convenient
reviews.text: This hotel was in an excellent location. It was very convenient for different places that we visited. The rooms were clean and the breakfast was great. The hotel clerks were very friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Friendly, patient, helpful staff. My trip was with a group.  I had many questions and they were answered no matter how many times I had called the hotel or front desk. The food is excellent. I would definitely stay again. The rooms were comfortable and clean. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Stay could have been a lot better.
reviews.positives: The staff was friendly and very attentive to the customers needs.
reviews.negatives: That there was ONLY 1 working Elevator that took 15-20 minutes to come down or up. Housekeeping never came to our room to restock the bath towels.

reviews.title: I left and did not stay after being transferred to another room.
reviews.negatives: It had ants and the maintenance was not clean.,. Many stains and bugs.

reviews.title: Over price for a small room
reviews.positives: Free breakfast and clean rooms. The staffs were friendly.
reviews.negatives: Over price because room is so small and didn't even had any trash bags in the room.

reviews.title: HOT!! Maintenance was no help!
reviews.positives: We got there and couldn't get in our room. We got new keys twice before they moved us to a new room. Up and down the elevator and hot hallways. Then in the new room, the AC didn't work. We called maintenance,  they cleaned the filter, fooled with the thermostat and felt cool air for a few seconds so they left. It quit immediately.  When I called the front desk the woman acted as if I didn't know how to use the thermostat. I had to buy a fan for us to use. Won't stay there again.
reviews.negatives: The facilities were hot, including our room with no AC.
